/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libSimpleAmqpClient.so.7 -o libSimpleAmqpClient.so.7.0.1 CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/AmqpException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/ChannelImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/BasicMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/AmqpLibraryException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/AmqpResponseLibraryException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/Envelope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/MessageReturnedException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/Table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleAmqpClient.dir/src/TableImpl.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librabbitmq.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrt
